_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: MultiOrbitSemiCircle
_meta.description:
This component renders three concentric semi-circle orbits populated with app icons that display tooltips on hover.
It includes a large blurred radial gradient in the background, fading upward to overlap the heading and description for added depth.
The design adapts for light and dark modes, using black or white fades to keep the glow visible in both themes.
